leaves.title: Bootstrap the upstream draft pack

Create the new gates master, leaves ledger, scope note, contradiction report, checklist, and execution log under docs/planning/ using live repo truth only.
Keep the pack unrouted and mark any Gate 247 placeholder as planning bookkeeping only until the router quartet moves together.
Add explicit negative-proof coverage-map or vocabulary-lock checks so the gate turns red when deferred scope or contract mappings drift.

Do not present the pack as active authority while repo-root PLANS.md still says no active pack.

ordered_actions: Identify whether each participation/liquidity truth belongs in TemporalContextInput, MarketRegimeContextInput, OptionsFlowContextInput, or normalised_features according to existing step responsibilities.
Wire only the lawful supporting fields and update docs/tests accordingly.
Preserve current options-flow semantics except for lawful participation-supporting enrichment if it already belongs there.
Add or update named runtime checkpoints, bounded observable state, structured docstrings, and at least one red-turning negative proof for every modified boundary touched by this leaf.
forbidden_actions: Do not turn participation truth into a new hidden risk lane.
Do not widen OptionsFlowContextInput with unrelated regime families.
expected_evidence: temporal/options-flow ingress reflects the promoted participation truth lawfully
Step responsibilities remain explicit
definition_of_done: Participation-supporting truth reaches lawful ingress readers only.
No downstream redesign occurs.
leaves.packaging_requirement: If this leaf closes the gate, GitHub branch/commit/merge receipts are the default closeout evidence when metadata is available. Create a fresh full-history zip only if the operator explicitly requests backup, offline handoff, or sandbox transfer packaging.

leaves.title: Prove downstream contract non-redesign within the wiring gate
leaves.objective: Add bounded tests proving Steps 4-6 contracts remain intact while the upstream ingress gets richer.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf catches accidental downstream redesign before Gate 252 broadens into the final tranche proof.
ordered_actions: Add bounded tests proving live regime/participation ingress is now populated from runtime truth.
Add bounded tests proving Steps 4-6 code paths and CDA separation are not redesigned in this gate.
Add or update named runtime checkpoints, bounded observable state, structured docstrings, and at least one red-turning negative proof for every modified boundary touched by this leaf.
forbidden_actions: Do not rely only on happy-path fixture tests that bypass the live ingress.
Do not close the gate if live ingress changed but non-interference is still untested.
expected_evidence: Gate 251 tests prove populated live regime input and no Step 4-6 redesign
definition_of_done: Live raw-to-cognition wiring is test-covered.
Downstream contract non-redesign is already visible before final proof.
leaves.packaging_requirement: If this leaf closes the gate, GitHub branch/commit/merge receipts are the default closeout evidence when metadata is available. Create a fresh full-history zip only if the operator explicitly requests backup, offline handoff, or sandbox transfer packaging.

leaves.title: Close Gate 251 with ingress proof
leaves.objective: Close the raw-to-cognition wiring gate only after live regime ingress and participation-supporting ingress are wired and bounded proof is green.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf hands off to the final non-interference trace gate with one truthful active-gate state.
ordered_actions: Run the declared Gate 251 proof slice.
Update PLANS.md, the gate map, the leaves ledger, and the execution log together so Gate 252 becomes the only active gate.
Record the exact wiring surfaces, test commands, and observed results in the execution log.
Add or update named runtime checkpoints, bounded observable state, structured docstrings, and at least one red-turning negative proof for every modified boundary touched by this leaf.
forbidden_actions: Do not close Gate 251 if downstream non-redesign is still only inferred.
Do not leave RealDataCognitionInputs and ChainToCognitionService out of sync about live regime ingress.
expected_evidence: Gate 251 tests green
router quartet now points to Gate 252 active
execution log records Gate 251 receipt
definition_of_done: Live regime and participation ingress is wired truthfully.
Gate 252 is the only active gate after closeout.
leaves.packaging_requirement: If this leaf closes the gate, GitHub branch/commit/merge receipts are the default closeout evidence when metadata is available. Create a fresh full-history zip only if the operator explicitly requests backup, offline handoff, or sandbox transfer packaging.

leaves.title: Rerun the corrected-stack regression slice
leaves.objective: Re-run the bounded corrected-stack acceptance slice so upstream truth promotion proves non-interference rather than assuming it.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf is the hard integrity gate that keeps the richer ingress from reopening the corrected serial stack.
ordered_actions: Run the bounded corrected-stack acceptance slice that protects Steps 3-6 and CDA separation.
Record any regression as a stop condition rather than compensating by redesigning downstream logic.
Add or update named runtime checkpoints, bounded observable state, structured docstrings, and at least one red-turning negative proof for every modified boundary touched by this leaf.
forbidden_actions: Do not hand-wave a downstream regression as acceptable because the upstream inputs got richer.
Do not expand into optimiser-style evaluation work here.
expected_evidence: corrected-stack regression slice green
definition_of_done: Steps 3-6 and CDA separation remain intact under the richer ingress.
Any failure is explicit stop-state evidence.
leaves.packaging_requirement: If this leaf closes the gate, GitHub branch/commit/merge receipts are the default closeout evidence when metadata is available. Create a fresh full-history zip only if the operator explicitly requests backup, offline handoff, or sandbox transfer packaging.

leaves.title: Add bounded cross-asset sanity trace

leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf proves the richer regime truth is visible to the live cognition grammar without becoming an optimisation pass.
ordered_actions: Add one bounded trace scenario that varies cross-asset inputs only.
Hold the rest of the runtime state fixed so the interpretive change is attributable to the promoted regime truth.
Keep the trace as a sanity check only, not an optimisation evaluation.
Add or update named runtime checkpoints, bounded observable state, structured docstrings, and at least one red-turning negative proof for every modified boundary touched by this leaf.

Do not let the trace mutate downstream authority surfaces.

definition_of_done: Cross-asset regime promotion is visible in a bounded trace.

leaves.title: Log remaining Class A gaps truthfully
leaves.objective: Record the still-missing Class A families at closeout so the tranche does not pretend the upstream truth gap is fully solved.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf keeps deferred upstream work visible and prevents false closeout completeness.
ordered_actions: Update the coverage map and execution log to record which Class A families remain deferred at closeout.
Record whether any optional top-of-book work also remained deferred.
Add or update named runtime checkpoints, bounded observable state, structured docstrings, and at least one red-turning negative proof for every modified boundary touched by this leaf.
forbidden_actions: Do not let deferred families disappear from the final receipt.
Do not reclassify a still-missing family as solved just because downstream logic can already name it.
expected_evidence: execution log and coverage map both record the remaining Class A families
definition_of_done: Deferred upstream gaps remain explicit at closeout.

leaves.title: Close the tranche truthfully
leaves.objective: Close the upstream signal completion tranche only after the non-interference slice, bounded traces, and router closeout all agree on the finished state.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf closes the tranche and must leave no stale active-pack wording or hidden completeness claims behind.
ordered_actions: Run the declared final tranche proof slice.
Update PLANS.md, the gate map, the gates master, the leaves ledger, the execution log, and retained support docs together so no active pack remains if the tranche is complete.
Record the exact observed proof counts and any remaining deferred families truthfully.
Add or update named runtime checkpoints, bounded observable state, structured docstrings, and at least one red-turning negative proof for every modified boundary touched by this leaf.
forbidden_actions: Do not close the tranche while any routing surface still reports an active gate.
Do not leave stale Gate 252-active wording in retained support docs or tests.

router quartet shows no active pack
support docs are in closed-pack language
definition_of_done: The tranche is closed truthfully with no active pack routed.
